category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Egypt under NTRA oversight.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (NTRA)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入埃及：NTRA合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入埃及：NTRA合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Egypt NTRA mandatory type approval under Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003, EOS/ES technical and EMC standards, electrical safety requirements for 220 V / 50 Hz supply, local Egyptian importer obligations, and GOEIC import conformity inspection.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与埃及NTRA强制型式核准（依据2003年第10号电信法）、EOS/ES技术及电磁兼容标准、220V/50Hz供电电气安全要求、当地埃及进口商义务及GOEIC进口符合性检验的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與埃及NTRA強制型式核准（依據2003年第10號電信法）、EOS/ES技術及電磁相容標準、220V/50Hz供電電氣安全要求、當地埃及進口商義務及GOEIC進口符合性檢驗的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, NTRA type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Egyptian telecommunications law, NTRA type approval procedures, EOS standards, GOEIC import requirements, Arabic labelling obligations, and applicable customs duties with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Egypt.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、NTRA型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于埃及销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行埃及电信法、NTRA型式核准程序、EOS标准、GOEIC进口要求、阿拉伯语标注义务及适用关税。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、NTRA型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於埃及銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行埃及電信法、NTRA型式核准程序、EOS標準、GOEIC進口要求、阿拉伯語標注義務及適用關稅。

answer_first.en: NTRA mandatory type approval under Egypt Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003 is the primary gap for any wireless or telecom terminal device exported from China to Egypt. CE mark and CCC are not recognised; SRRC approval does not satisfy NTRA requirements. The NTRA approval number must appear on the product label in Arabic and/or English. Additional gaps include EOS/ES technical and EMC standards conformity, GOEIC import conformity inspection, a local Egyptian importer company, 220 V / 50 Hz electrical safety with Type C/F plug, and Arabic labelling obligations.
answer_first.zh: 依据埃及2003年第10号电信法，NTRA强制型式核准是中国出口至埃及的任何无线或电信终端设备的首要差距。CE标志和CCC均不被承认；SRRC批准不满足NTRA要求。NTRA批准号须以阿拉伯语和/或英语标注于产品标签上。其他差距还包括EOS/ES技术及电磁兼容标准符合性、GOEIC进口符合性检验、须有当地埃及进口商公司、220V/50Hz电气安全（C/F型插头）及阿拉伯语标注义务。
answer_first.zht: 依據埃及2003年第10號電信法，NTRA強制型式核准是中國出口至埃及的任何無線或電信終端裝置的首要差距。CE標誌和CCC均不被承認；SRRC批准不滿足NTRA要求。NTRA批准號須以阿拉伯語和/或英語標注於產品標籤上。其他差距還包括EOS/ES技術及電磁相容標準符合性、GOEIC進口符合性檢驗、須有當地埃及進口商公司、220V/50Hz電氣安全（C/F型插頭）及阿拉伯語標注義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
